What's included

Everything you need
to move fast — and well.

🎯
1:1 Coaching Sessions
Three 90-minute sessions per month. Deep, focused, and built around what matters most to you right now.
📋
Centralized Coaching Dashboard
All your coaching resources + needle-moving tasks in one place — so you always know what (and what not!) to focus on next.
Example Dashboard →
🎙️
Session Recordings & Summaries
Every session captured and summarized, stored directly in your coaching dashboard. Revisit insights anytime.
💬
Unlimited Async. Support
Mon–Fri support for unforeseen events + feedback between sessions. Audio & video messages welcome (5 min/day).

Tiers

Choose your horizon.

All tiers include everything above. The difference is duration, depth, and how far we can go together.

Commitment

100% No money back
guarantee.

(read that again)

Part of the transformative nature of this work is stepping into it with full commitment. Under no circumstances will you get a refund.

If you are unsure if you want to work with me — or if you have what it takes to create an amazing return on your investment and commitment — you are not ready.
